---
title: "Talks & Presentations"
---

## Keynote Talks

### SciML for Biosystems
**FoodSIM 2026**

[📄 Slides](assets/foodsim.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}

---

### Uncertainty: Its Quantification, Mitigation, Propagation and Decision Making
**FIND4S Capacity Building Programme** · Indonesia, 2025

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fgrXlxH3PPY start="1260" >}}
